IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (39413067.pdf)
SUMMARY: Highly skilled, results-driven Information Technology Specialist/Consultant with extensive experience in business operations, infrastructure management, software/hardware support, and technical project management. Expertise includes Active Directory, C#, Java, SQL, and network administration.
SKILLS: Active Directory, C#, Java, SQL, Network Administration, Project Management, Technical Support, Consulting, Client Support, Database Management, Software Development, System Design
